---
title: 'Nelson Roque'
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
  pdf:
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* Overall page */
main.content {
  max-width: 8.5in;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 0.25in;
}

/* Typography */
body,
p,
li,
td,
th {
  font-family: Calibri, Carlito, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 11pt;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #000;
}

/* Title */
#title-block-header {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.quarto-title .title,
.quarto-title-block .title {
  font-size: 22pt;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

/* Headings */
h2 {
  font-size: 13pt;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 1.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #000;
  padding-bottom: 0.08rem;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 11pt;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}

/* Paragraphs & lists */
p {
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0;
}

ul,
ol {
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0.45rem 1.3rem;
  padding-left: 0;
}

li {
  margin-bottom: 0.12rem;
}

/* Links */
a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* Tables */
table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

th,
td {
  padding: 0.15rem 0;
  vertical-align: top;
}

/* Printing */
@media print {
  body {
    font-size: 10.5pt;
  }

  h2,
  h3 {
    break-after: avoid;
  }

  p,
  li {
    orphans: 3;
    widows: 3;
  }
}
</style>
{{< include sections/intro.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/appointments.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/education.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/interests.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/publications/peer-reviewed.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/publications/in-preparation.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/publications/book-chapters.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/publications/technical-reports.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/publications/conference-proceedings.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/funding.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/awards.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/teaching.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/service.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/memberships.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/outreach_science.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/outreach_community.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/presentations/presentations.qmd >}}
